decision: Reject before execution unless github.actor is crcorbett and the comment begins exactly with @claude; retain read-only tools only.
evidenceRequired: Exact event actor, conversation, source revision, and invocation classification.
Static owner and startsWith gates plus bounded permissions, timeout, concurrency, and tool allowlist.
limitations: Repository source cannot prove GitHub event evaluation, OIDC exchange, secret availability, external action behavior, or a workflow run.
nonClaims: A matching source predicate does not establish external authority or runtime behavior.
rollbackRevocation: Cancel or disable the workflow and revoke the Anthropic integration under separate authority; preserve sanitized failed-run evidence if any.
